name: ExtensionAppointment_OccurrenceChanged
title: R5: Indicates that this appointment varies from a recurrence pattern (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Appointment.occurrenceChanged` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Appointment.occurrenceChanged` 0..1 `boolean`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Appointment.occurrenceChanged` 0..1 `boolean`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Appointment.occurrenceChanged` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.occurrenceChanged` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Indicates that this appointment varies from a recurrence pattern (new)
element.comment:
Element `Appointment.occurrenceChanged` has a context of Appointment based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Appointment`.
Element `Appointment.occurrenceChanged` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
For example, if a patient has physical therapy appointments every Tuesday and Thursday, but due to a national holiday, a single occurrence was rescheduled to a different day, while the rest of the recurring series remained on Tuesday / Thursday.

element.short: Indicates that this appointment varies from a recurrence pattern
element.definition: This appointment varies from the recurring pattern.
element.comment: For example, if a patient has physical therapy appointments every Tuesday and Thursday, but due to a national holiday, a single occurrence was rescheduled to a different day, while the rest of the recurring series remained on Tuesday / Thursday.
